quickSummary: Nice work! Your introduction was clear, organized, and easy to understand. You shared relevant details about yourself and showed good effort in keeping your speech connected.
transcript: Hi everyone, my name is Mia. I am a student at XYZ University, majoring in Computer Science. I have always been passionate about technology and programming. In my free time, I enjoy hiking and exploring new places. I also love cooking and trying out new recipes. I'm excited to be here and look forward to getting to know all of you better.
whatYouDidWell: You started with a clear self-introduction that helped the audience understand who you are
You organized your ideas in a logical order, making your speech easy to follow
You included personal details that made your introduction feel more authentic
You explained your interests and background with enough detail to help the audience connect with you

structureAnalysis.feedback: This is a clear and friendly opening. It helps the audience immediately understand who is speaking.

structureAnalysis.excerpt: You explained your background, interests, and what you enjoy doing.
structureAnalysis.feedback: The middle part gives useful context about yourself. To make it stronger, you can connect each idea more smoothly so the speech feels more natural.

structureAnalysis.excerpt: The introduction ends after sharing your interests.
structureAnalysis.feedback: The ending is understandable, but it could be more memorable with a short closing sentence that leaves a positive final impression.

recommendedActions.title: Add smoother transitions
recommendedActions.description: Try using simple transition phrases such as 'Aside from that,' 'Another thing about me is,' or 'That is why I am interested in...' These phrases can help your ideas flow more naturally from one point to the next.

recommendedActions.title: Create a stronger closing
recommendedActions.description: End your introduction with a short sentence that feels complete. For example: 'I'm excited to share more and learn together with all of you.' This helps your speech feel more polished.

recommendedActions.title: Speak with more expression
recommendedActions.description: Your content is already clear, but adding slight changes in tone can make your introduction sound more engaging. Emphasize important words and smile naturally when sharing something personal.
